No API design or tooling issues found for `@azure/arm-servicefabric@4.0.0-beta.1`. All version strings are consistent across `package.json`, `src/api/serviceFabricManagementContext.ts`, and `CHANGELOG.md`. The CHANGELOG correctly compares against the last stable `3.0.0`. No `_N` naming clashes, no `AutoGenerated` suffixes, no `unknown` in public models, and no `void` return types on non-delete operations were found.

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

Please follow the [conflict guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/documentation/resolve-pnpm-lock-merge-conflict.md) to resolve manually.
